topics.title: Health and Physical Exam
topics.summary: Donald Trump recently underwent a physical examination at Walter Reed, declaring himself in 'perfect health.' This announcement comes amidst ongoing discussions about his age and health status, particularly as he continues to engage in political activities. His health updates are closely monitored by both supporters and critics, reflecting the heightened scrutiny of his public persona.
topics.summaryZh: 唐纳德·特朗普最近在沃尔特·里德进行了一次体检，宣称自己“健康完美”。这一声明是在他继续参与政治活动的同时发布的，尤其是在关于他年龄和健康状况的讨论中。他的健康更新受到支持者和批评者的密切关注，反映出公众对他形象的高度审视。

topics.title: Political Endorsements and Campaigns
topics.summary: Trump has been actively endorsing candidates for upcoming elections, including his support for Byron Donalds in Florida's gubernatorial race. His endorsements are part of a broader strategy to maintain influence within the Republican Party and ensure alignment with his 'America First' agenda. This involvement highlights his ongoing role in shaping the political landscape as he prepares for future elections.
topics.summaryZh: 特朗普积极支持即将举行的选举候选人，包括他对佛罗里达州州长竞选中拜伦·唐纳兹的支持。他的支持是维持在共和党内影响力和确保与“美国优先”议程一致的更广泛战略的一部分。这种参与突显了他在为未来选举做准备时继续塑造政治格局的角色。

topics.title: International Relations and Military Stance
topics.summary: Trump's recent comments regarding Iran and military actions reflect his assertive stance on international relations. He has expressed a strong position against Iran, suggesting that their military capabilities are diminished. This rhetoric is part of his broader narrative on national security and foreign policy, which resonates with his base and aims to position him as a strong leader on the global stage.
topics.summaryZh: 特朗普最近关于伊朗和军事行动的评论反映了他在国际关系上的强硬立场。他对伊朗表达了强烈的看法，暗示他们的军事能力已经减弱。这种言辞是他关于国家安全和外交政策的更广泛叙述的一部分，与他的支持者产生共鸣，并旨在将他定位为全球舞台上的强大领导者。

summary24h.text: 刚刚完成在沃尔特·里德的六个月体检，一切都检查得完美。
summary24h.videoQuery: Donald Trump Walter Reed physical exam

summary24h.text: 在社交媒体上发布了关于伊朗的声明，强调美国的军事力量。
在社交媒体上支持佛罗里达州的拜伦·唐纳兹竞选州长。
因天气原因，推迟了内阁会议，改在白宫举行。

socialMedia.text: It is critically important that the CFTC’s exclusive authority over Prediction Markets is maintained, and that they will thrive. Under my leadership, we are setting “rules of the road” that are the Gold Standard for the States. We cannot have SCUM like Chris Christie, Letitia James, Tim Walz, and JB Pritzker setting the rules! Other Countries are after this new form of Financial Market, and we want to remain at the top. Likewise, and even more importantly, where we are currently the Crypto (Bitcoin, etc.) Capital of the World, other Countries are trying diligently to replace us in that capacity, but we won’t let that happen. It is a major Industry, and we must protect it. Mike Selig, CFTC Chairman, and respected by all, is doing a great job. Thank you Mike! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 保持CFTC对预测市场的独占权至关重要，我们希望它们能够蓬勃发展。在我的领导下，我们正在制定“道路规则”，这将成为各州的黄金标准。我们不能让像克里斯·克里斯蒂、莱蒂蒂亚·詹姆斯、蒂姆·沃尔兹和JB·普利茨克这样的败类来制定规则！其他国家正在争夺这种新型金融市场，我们希望保持领先地位。同样，更重要的是，我们目前是全球加密货币（比特币等）的中心，其他国家正在努力取代我们，但我们不会让这种情况发生。这是一个重要的行业，我们必须保护它。迈克·塞利格，CFTC主席，受到所有人的尊重，做得非常出色。谢谢你，迈克！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: Based on the possible bad weather conditions tomorrow, we will be having our Cabinet Meeting in the White House, and will be postponing the Cabinet trip to Camp David. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 鉴于明天可能出现恶劣天气，我们将在白宫召开内阁会议，并将推迟内阁前往戴维营的行程。感谢您对此事的关注！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: Highly Respected Congressman Byron Donalds is running for Governor of Florida, a State that I love, and WON BIG, in 2016, 2020, and 2024.I know Byron well, have seen him tested at the highest and most difficult levels, and he is a TOTAL WINNER! Byron has a great wife, Erika, and three beautiful sons. They are very proud of him! As Governor, Byron will have a BIG Voice, and work closely with me to advance our America First Agenda. He will fight tirelessly to help Keep our Border SECURE, Stop Migrant Crime, Strengthen our Military, Protect our Veterans, Advance American Energy DOMINANCE, Cut Taxes and Regulations, Promote MADE IN THE U.S.A., and Defend our always under siege Second Amendment.Byron Donalds will be a truly Great and Powerful Governor for Florida, and has my Complete and Total Endorsement — HE WILL NOT LET YOU DOWN!
socialMedia.textZh: 备受尊敬的国会议员拜伦·唐纳尔德正在竞选我所热爱的佛罗里达州州长，并在2016年、2020年和2024年取得了巨大胜利。我非常了解拜伦，见证了他在最高和最困难的层面上的考验，他是一个彻底的赢家！拜伦有一个出色的妻子埃里卡和三个美丽的儿子。他们为他感到非常自豪！作为州长，拜伦将拥有一个强大的声音，并与我紧密合作，推进我们的美国优先议程。他将不懈努力，帮助确保我们的边界安全，制止移民犯罪，加强我们的军队，保护我们的退伍军人，推动美国能源的主导地位，减税和减少监管，促进美国制造，并捍卫我们始终受到攻击的第二修正案。拜伦·唐纳尔德将成为佛罗里达州真正伟大而强大的州长，并获得我完全的支持——他不会让你失望！

socialMedia.text: If Iran surrenders, admits their Navy is gone and resting at the bottom of the sea, and their Air Force is no longer with us, and if their entire Military walks out of Tehran, weapons dropped and hands held high, each shouting “I surrender, I surrender” while wildly waving the representative White Flag, and if their entire remaining Leadership signs all necessary “Documents of Surrender,” and admit their defeat to the great power and force of the magnificent U.S.A., The Failing New York Times, The China Street Journal (WSJ!), Corrupt and now Irrelevant CNN, and all other members of the Fake News Media, will headline that Iran had a Masterful and Brilliant Victory over The United States of America, it wasn’t even close. The Dumacrats and Media have totally lost their way. They have gone absolutely CRAZY!!! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 如果伊朗投降，承认他们的海军已经消失，沉没在海底，他们的空军不再存在，如果他们整个军队从德黑兰走出，武器扔掉，双手高举，每个人都大喊“我投降，我投降”，同时疯狂挥舞代表性的白旗，如果他们所有剩余的领导层签署所有必要的“投降文件”，承认他们对伟大的美国的强大力量的失败，《纽约时报》、华尔街日报（WSJ！）、腐败且现在无关紧要的CNN，以及所有其他假新闻媒体，将头条报道伊朗在对美国的战争中取得了卓越而辉煌的胜利，根本没有悬念。民主党人和媒体完全迷失了方向。他们已经完全疯狂了！！！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: Teen takeover in Chicago. Five officers badly hurt. Mayor and Governor are terrible. Should call for help!

socialMedia.text: Just finished my 6 month physical at Walter Reed Military Medical Center. Everything checked out PERFECTLY. Thank you to the great Doctors and Staff! Heading back to the White House. President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 刚刚在沃尔特·里德军事医疗中心完成了六个月的体检。一切检查结果完美。感谢伟大的医生和工作人员！正在返回白宫。总统DJT

socialMedia.text: Great job by Congressman Derrick Van Orden on FoxNews. A real PRO! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 国会议员德里克·范·奥登在福克斯新闻上的表现非常出色。真正的专业人士！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: Historian, and far beyond that, Victor Davis Hanson, is GREAT. That’s all I have to say. There is no further explanation needed. A fantastic man! President DJT
